name: skill-creator
description: Create, lint, fix, and extract reusable Python scripts from Cursor Agent Skills. Eval-driven development with prompt engineering best practices.

commands.name: SKILL-creator
commands.description: Create, test, and iterate on Cursor Agent Skills with eval-driven development

commands.name: SKILL-lint
commands.description: Audit skill files for structural issues, best-practice violations, and spec drift

commands.name: SKILL-fix
commands.description: Auto-repair skill files — fix logic issues first, then format enforcement, with diff confirmation

commands.name: SKILL-pythonGenerator
commands.description: Extract deterministic, repetitive logic from skills into reusable Python CLI scripts

commands.name: SKILL-setup
commands.description: Install, update, configure, or uninstall the skill-creator plugin
